reviews.author: Bing Jiao
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about potential infinite loop issues when memory.high is breached and suggested introducing a fix orthogonal to the patch series.

reviews.author: Joshua Hahn
reviews.summary: Clarified the patch's behavior and interaction with the standard memory reclaim infrastructure, addressing Bing's concerns about infinite loop issues.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: Discussion around the memory.high tier-aware patch, focusing on its interaction with the standard memory reclaim infrastructure and potential infinite loop issues.
